reasoning_content:
The SYsULexer.tokens file is outdated. It doesn't have the new tokens I added to the Task 1 lexer. I need to regenerate the Task 1 lexer first to update the token definitions, then copy them to Task 2.

Actually, looking at the structure, Task 2 uses its own lexer definition. The SYsULexer.tokens file in task/2/antlr/ needs to be updated to match the tokens from Task 1.

Let me check how the tokens are generated for Task 1 and see if I can use them for Task 2.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cat /workspace/YatCC/antlr4_generated_src/task1-antlr/SYsULexer.tokens 2>/dev/null || echo \"File not found\"", "summary": "Check task1 generated tokens"}
